title: Valrond
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[Captain/Legends|Captain]] '''Valrond''' was an alias created by [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] to match the false ID [[Transponder code/Legends|transponder code]] that the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] was using to identify the [[Starship/Legends|ship]] as the ''Victory Ring''.

During the [[Reconnaissance mission to Ord Mantell|mission to]] [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]], [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] also used the Valrond alias, as Han had never specified a [[Gender/Legends|gender]] for the captain.

==Appearances==
*''[[Rebel Mission to Ord Mantell]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 2011-11-03 -->''[[Millennium Falcon Owner's Workshop Manual]]'' {{C|Appears on computer screen}}
*<!-- 2013-10-15 -->''[[The Bounty Hunter Code: From the Files of Boba Fett]]''
